title: FrostyFault
description: It Is An Crystal PvP Texture Pack By FrostyMee
body:
# This Is Frosty's Official Texture Pack

**A Minecraft Texture pack that help you to improve crystal pvp so fast**
_In This Mod_

1. Low Fire
2. Small totem
3. small totem pop
4. smooth crystal blast
5. better shield 
6. Lag reducing 
7. Fps boost 
8. many more !
